name: Hudson Nissan
description_short: Hudson Nissan is a credit repair provider based in Jersey City, New Jersey. Rated 4.5/5 with 2,339 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Hudson Nissan is a credit repair provider serving clients in Jersey City, New Jersey. With 2,339 Google reviews and a 4.5/5.0 rating, Hudson Nissan has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a car finance and loan company, auto repair shop, car dealer, Hudson Nissan provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Jersey City, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Hudson Nissan operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Jersey City, New Jersey area who are considering Hudson Nissan should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
